title: heliotropium digynum
intro: Heliotropium digynum, also known as Bastard Indigo or Yellow Bird, is a perennial herb belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Heliotropium digynum include treating respiratory issues such as coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. The herbal preparation of Heliotropium digynum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
